sqlMap.select: select id,to_char(start_date,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as createTime ,start_member_id as createMember, field0001 as assetNo, field0002 as assetCategory, field0003 as assetsName, field0004 as assetModel, 'OA' as assetSource, field0006 as assetState, to_char(field0007,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as purchaseDate, field0008 as purchaseAmount, field0018 as assetPriceNotDuty, field0019/100 as dutyRate, field0020 as dutyAmount, to_char(field0009,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as depreciationDate, field0010 as isMature, to_char(field0011,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as warrantyPeriod, field0012 as usePeople, field0013 as usePeopleId, field0014 as useDepartment, field0015 as designatedArea, to_char(field0016,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as registerTime, to_char(field0017,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as upTime, '' as relevanceSignNo, '' as relevanceSignTitle, field0070 as relevanceContractNo, field0065 as relevanceContractTitle, field0022 as remark, '' as relevanceProjectTitle, '' as relevanceProjectNo, '' as relevanceBidTitle, '' as relevanceBidNo, '' as keeper, '' as relevanceContractURL, field0055 as kmID from formmain_0123 where start_date >= to_date(#dateTime#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and field0001 is not null

select f.id, f.field0001 assetCode, f.field0002 assetType, f.field0003 assetName, f.field0004 assetModel, f.field0006 assetStatus, to_char(f.field0007,'yyyymmdd' ) buyDate, util_user.getMemberNameByLoginName(util_user.getLoginNameByMemId(f.field0012)) applyUser, f.field0012 applyUserId, f.field0071 as assetSpot, f.field0073 assetMark from formmain_0123 f where 1 = 1
f.field0006 <> -5190900076558529642
f.field0073 is null
f.field0001 in
#code[]#
f.field0015 = #region#

select accountId,id, applyUserId, applyUser, buyDate, assetCode, assetType, assetName, assetModel, assetMark from vm_assetcolinfo where type = #type#
id = #id#
formmain_id = #formmain_id#
select markurl as fieldid, to_char(markdate,'yyyy-mm-dd') as createdate from vm_assetcolinfo where type = #tableName# and formmain_id = #mainId#
select count(*) from vm_assetcolinfo where type = #tableName# and formmain_id = #mainId#

SELECT id, field0003 as typeCode, field0004 as showValue, field0005 as currentValue, field0006 as accountCode, field0007 as historyCode FROM formmain_0595 WHERE field0002 = #typeId# AND field0001 = #accountId#
sqlMap.update: update formmain_0595 set field0005 = #currentValue#, field0004 = #showValue#,field0007 = #historyCode# where field0002 = #typeId# AND field0001 = #accountId#
sqlMap.select:
select id,positioncode,positionname,positionmark from vm_assetPosition where 1 = 1
positioncode in
#code[]#
select max(t.positioncode) from vm_assetPosition t
sqlMap.update: update vm_assetPosition set positionstatus = util_common.getEnumIdByShow(4275550571744871391,'失效') where positioncode = #code#
sqlMap.select: select creater, batchmanager, to_char(batchdate,'yyyy-mm-dd') as batchdate, batchno, batchregion, batchstatus, batchnote,isCheckAll from vm_assetcheckbatch where util_common.getenumshowbyid(batchstatus) = #status#
sqlMap.update: update vm_assetcheckBatch set batchstatus = #status# where batchno = #batchno#
sqlMap.select:
select * from vm_assetcheckresult where 1=1
batchNo = #batchNo#
assetcode = #assetCode#
sqlMap.update:
update vm_assetcheckresult set
isInStock = #isInStock#
positionChange = #positionChange#
inventoryPosition = #inventoryPosition#
where batchno = #batchNo# and assetcode = #assetCode#
sqlMap.insert: insert into vm_assetcheckresult(id,batchno,assetcode,assetname, assettype, inventoryposition, depositposition,inventoryregion, positionchange,isinstock,belonginventoryrange,impdate,inventorymanager,buytime,inventorynote,assetstatus, assetSysResult, asstModel, systemFlg, assetSysLocation ) values (#id#,#batchNo#,#assetCode#,#assetName#,#assetType#,#inventoryPosition#,#depositPosition#,#inventoryRegion#,#positionChange#, #isInStock#,#belongInventoryRange#,#impDate#,#inventoryManager#,#buyTime#,#inventoryNote#,#assetStatus#, #assetSysResult#, #asstModel#, #systemFlg#, #assetSysLocation# )

insert into vm_assetcheckresult(id,batchno,assetcode,assetname, assettype,depositposition,inventoryregion,impdate,positionchange,isinstock,belonginventoryrange,inventorymanager,buytime,assetstatus) select util_common.getID() ,f2.batchno,f1.assetsCode,f1.assetsName,f1.assetModel,f1.assetSpot,f2.batchregion,to_char(f2.batchdate,'yyyy-mm-dd') ,util_common.getEnumIdByRefName('位置变化','否') ,util_common.getEnumIdByRefName('盘点是否在库','不在库'),util_common.getEnumIdByRefName('属于盘点范围','是') ,f2.batchmanager,to_char(f1.buyTime,'yyyy-mm-dd'),f1.assetstatus from vm_assetdocument f1,vm_assetcheckbatch f2 where f2.batchstatus = util_common.getEnumIdByRefName('盘点状态','盘点中') and nvl(f1.Region,1) = nvl(f2.batchregion,nvl(f1.Region,1)) and f2.batchno = #batchno# and f1.assetstatus != util_common.getEnumIdByRefName('资产状态','已处置')
sqlMap.update: update vm_assetdocument set definingLabels = #definingLabels# where assetsCode = #asstCode#
sqlMap.select: select vm.templateNo,vm.fieldChinessName,vm.isNull,vm.fieldName from vm_flowConfiguration vm where vm.templateNo = #templateNo#

select id, formmain_id sort, assettype, assetname, assetPrice, count, use, applysituation, notaxprice, tax, taxprice, defectsperiod, userPeriod from vm_wfcomputerassetpurchase where formmain_id = #formId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into vm_wfcomassetpurchasedetail (id, formmain_id, sort, assettype, assetname, assetPrice, assetmodel, productserialNumber, defectsperiod, userPeriod, hidDisk1type, hidDisk1Size, hidDisk2type, hidDisk2Size, memoryType, memorySize, memoryCount ) values( #id#, #formmain_id#, #sort#, util_common.getEnumIdByRefName('资产分类',#assetType#), util_common.getEnumIdByRefName('资产分类',#assetName#) , #assetPrice#, #assetModel#, #productSerialNumber#, null, #userPeriod#, util_common.getEnumIdByRefName('电脑硬盘类型',#hidDisk1Type#), #hidDisk1Size#, util_common.getEnumIdByRefName('电脑硬盘类型',#hidDisk2Type#), #hidDisk2Size#, util_common.getEnumIdByRefName('内存类型',#memoryType#), util_common.getEnumIdByRefName('电脑内存尺寸',#memorySize#), #memoryCount# )
sqlMap.select: select propertyPrice from vm_defaultPropertyInfo where propertyType = (select ID from ctp_enum_item where SHOWVALUE = #assetType#) and propertyName = (select ID from ctp_enum_item where SHOWVALUE = #assetName#)
select id, formmain_id, memorySort, memoryAccessoriesType, memoryType, memorySize, memoryPrice, memoryState, memoryCount from wf_accessoriesmemoryson where formmain_id = #formId#

select id, formmain_id, hardDiskSort, hardDiskAccessoriesType, hardDiskType, hardDiskSize, hardDiskPrice, hardDiskState, hardDiskSequence, hardDiskCount from wf_accessoriesharddiskson where formmain_id = #formId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into wf_oaaccessoriesmemoryson (id, formmain_id, memorySort, memoryAccessoriesType, memoryType, memorySize, memoryPrice, memoryState )values( #id#, #formmain_id#, #memorySort#, #memoryAccessoriesType#, #memoryType#, #memorySize#, #memoryPrice#, #memoryState# )

insert into wf_oaaccessoriesharddiskson (id, formmain_id, hardDiskSort, hardDiskAccessoriesType, hardDiskType, hardDiskSize, hardDiskPrice, hardDiskState )values( #id#, #formmain_id#, #hardDiskSort#, #hardDiskAccessoriesType#, #hardDiskType#, #hardDiskSize#, #hardDiskPrice#, #hardDiskState# )
sqlMap.select:
select id, START_DATE, assetsCode as "assetsCode", assetCategory as "assetCategory", assetsName as "assetsName", assetModel as "assetModel", assetstatus as "assetstatus", buyTime as "buyTime", amount as "amount", dealType as "dealType", useYears as "useYears", assetSpot as "assetSpot", assetMark as "assetMark", region as "region", definingLabels as "definingLabels", useDepart as "useDepart", useMember as "useMember", isPay as "isPay", payDate as "payDate", payNo as "payNo", financeCardState as "financeCardState", financeCardCreateDate as "financeCardCreateDate", lastCheckingDate as "lastCheckingDate", lastCheckingState as "lastCheckingState", lastFinanceState as "lastFinanceState", financePageUrl as "financePageUrl", notaxamount as "noTaxAmount", recordDate as "recordDate" from vm_assetdocument where 1=1
accountId = #accountId#
START_DATE >= #startDate#
START_DATE <= #endDate#

select id, START_DATE, assetsCode as "assetsCode", assetCategory as "assetCategory", assetsName as "assetsName", assetModel as "assetModel", assetstatus as "assetstatus", buyTime as "buyTime", amount as "amount", dealType as "dealType", useYears as "useYears", assetSpot as "assetSpot", assetMark as "assetMark", region as "region", definingLabels as "definingLabels", useDepart as "useDepart", useMember as "useMember", isPay as "isPay", payDate as "payDate", payNo as "payNo", financeCardState as "financeCardState", financeCardCreateDate as "financeCardCreateDate", lastCheckingDate as "lastCheckingDate", lastCheckingState as "lastCheckingState", lastFinanceState as "lastFinanceState", financePageUrl as "financePageUrl", notaxamount as "noTaxAmount", recordDate as "recordDate" from vm_assetdocument where accountId = #accountId# and ((payDate is not null and payDate >= #startDate# and payDate <= #endDate#) or (payDate is null and START_DATE >= #startDate# and START_DATE <= #endDate#) )

select id,
assetsCode as "assetsCode", assetCategory as "assetCategory", assetsName as "assetsName", assetModel as "assetModel", assetstatus as "assetstatus", buyTime as "buyTime", amount as "amount", dealType as "dealType", useYears as "useYears", assetSpot as "assetSpot", assetMark as "assetMark", region as "region", definingLabels as "definingLabels", useDepart as "useDepart", useMember as "useMember", isPay as "isPay", payDate as "payDate", payNo as "payNo", financeCardState as "financeCardState", financeCardCreateDate as "financeCardCreateDate", lastCheckingDate as "lastCheckingDate", lastCheckingState as "lastCheckingState", lastFinanceState as "lastFinanceState", financePageUrl as "financePageUrl", notaxamount as "noTaxAmount", recordDate as "recordDate" from vm_assetdocument where accountId = #accountId# and id in (select formmain_id from vm_assetdispose where disposeDate <= #endDate# and disposeDate >= #startDate#) and assetstatus = '-5190900076558529642' and (lastFinanceState is null or lastFinanceState != '完全清理完毕（0399）')

select distinct to_char(neatValue) "neatValue", to_char(useTermCount) "useTermCount", to_char(tempDeprTermCount) "tempDeprTermCount", assetsCode "assetsCode" from vm_assetdocument va left join vm_assetdispositionson vad on va.id = vad.formmain_id where vad.dispositionDate is null
OR vad.dispositionDate >= SYSDATE - INTERVAL '3' MONTH;
sqlMap.update: update vm_assetdocument set neatValue = #neatValue#, useTermCount = #useTermCount#, tempDeprTermCount = #tempDeprTermCount#, RemainingUsefulLife = #remainingUsefulLife# where assetsCode = #assetCode#
update vm_assetdocument set isPay = #isPay#, payDate = #payDate#, payNo = #payNo#, financePageUrl = #payUrl#, notaxamount = #price# where assetsCode = #assetsCode#
update vm_assetdocument set financeCardState = #financeCardState#, financeCardCreateDate = #financeCardCreateDate# where assetsCode = #assetsCode#

update vm_assetdocument set
lastCheckingDate = #lastCheckingDate#,
lastCheckingState = #lastCheckingState#,
lastFinanceState = #lastFinanceState# where assetsCode = #assetsCode#
sqlMap.insert:
insert into vm_assetcheckrecord( id, state, start_member_id, start_date, approve_member_id, approve_date, finishedflag, ratifyflag, ratify_member_id, ratify_date, sort, modify_member_id, modify_date,
writer, writeDept, checkNo, checkDate, startDate, endDate, assectCode, assetCategory, assetsName,
assetstatus, buyDate, assetUser, checkState, financeAssetStatus ) values ( #id#,1,-6760911671874597139,sysdate,0,sysdate,0,0,0,null,0,-6760911671874597139,sysdate, #writer#, #writeDept#, #checkNo#, #checkDate#, #startDate#, #endDate#, #assectCode#, #assetCategory#, #assetsName#,
#assetstatus#, #buyDate#, #assetUser#, #checkState#, #financeAssetStatus# )

insert into vm_assetcheck_checkResult( id, state, start_member_id, start_date, approve_member_id, approve_date, finishedflag, ratifyflag, ratify_member_id, ratify_date, sort, modify_member_id, modify_date,
creator, createDate, checkStart, checkEnd, checkNo, oaExist, financeExist, oaDealed, financeDealed, checkSame, totalRecord, checkAccount ) values ( #id#,1,-6760911671874597139,sysdate,0,sysdate,0,0,0,null,0,-6760911671874597139,sysdate, #creator#, #createDate#, #checkStart#, #checkEnd#, #checkNo#, #oaExist#, #financeExist#, #oaDealed#, #financeDealed#, #checkSame#, #totalRecord#, #checkAccount# )
sqlMap.select: select field0006 from FORMMAIN_0595 where field0001 = #id# group by field0006
select oaAssetCode as "oaAssetCode", financeAssetCode as "financeAssetCode", ifIgnore as "ifIgnore" from vm_assetcheck_ignoreConfig where ifIgnore = '-286897663746683514'

select writer as "writer", writeDept as "writeDept", writeDate as "writeDate", accountId as "accountId", userName as "userName", passwordBase64 as "passwordBase64", slnName as "slnName", dcName as "dcName", language as "language", dbType as "dbType", keeper as "keeper", companyNumber as "companyNumber", deprMethod as "deprMethod", assetBalanceAmout as "assetBalanceAmout", currency as "currency", sourceType as "sourceType", unit as "unit", remark as "remark", assetPrefix as "assetPrefix", clearMode as "clearMode" from vm_KingdeeAssetParam where accountId = #accountId#
select accountPrefix||'-'||typeCode as "oaCode", kingdeeCode as "kdCode" from vm_AssetSeqCodeConfig

select id as "id", assetsCode as "assetsCode", assetCategory as "assetCategory", assetsName as "assetsName", assetModel as "assetModel", assetstatus as "assetstatus", buyTime as "buyTime", amount as "amount", dealType as "dealType", useYears as "useYears", assetMark as "assetMark", definingLabels as "definingLabels", useDepart as "useDepart", useMember as "useMember", isPay as "isPay", payDate as "payDate", payNo as "payNo", financeCardState as "financeCardState", financeCardCreateDate as "financeCardCreateDate", lastCheckingDate as "lastCheckingDate", lastCheckingState as "lastCheckingState", lastFinanceState as "lastFinanceState", financePageUrl as "financePageUrl", sn as "sn", recordDate as "recordDate", assetUse as "assetUse", remake as "remake", hiddisk1Size as "hiddisk1Size", hiddisk1type as "hiddisk1type", hiddisk2Size as "hiddisk2Size", hiddisk2type as "hiddisk2type", memoryType as "memoryType", memoryCount as "memoryCount", memorySize as "memorySize", taxPrice as "taxPrice", tax as "tax", notaxamount as "notaxamount", contractCode as "contractCode", contractTitle as "contractTitle", quot as "quot", assetSpot as "assetSpot", Region as "Region", enumStoryLocation as "enumStoryLocation", enumSpecStoryLocation as "enumSpecStoryLocation", accountId as "accountId" from vm_assetdocument where assetsCode = #assetsCode#
select to_char(id)value, showvalue name from ctp_enum_item where ref_enumid = #refId# and level_num = #levelNum# and state = 1
sqlMap.insert: insert into vm_applypartsdetail( id, sort, formmain_id, applyDate, /*申请日期*/ partsType, /*配件类型*/ partsSize, /*配件规格*/ partsPrice, /*配件价格*/ flowURL, /*url_相关流程*/ reason /*申请原因*/ ) values ( util_common.getAbsID, #seq#, (select id from vm_assetdocument where assetsCode = #assetsCode# ), #applyDate#, #partsType#, #partsSize#, #partsPrice#, #flowURL#, #reason# )
sqlMap.update: update vm_assetreturndocument set adminUserId = #adminUserId#, adminDeptId = #adminDeptId#,applyUserId = #applyUserId# where assetsCode = #assetsCode#
sqlMap.insert: insert into vm_assetdocumentson( id, formmain_id, transferAcceptDept , /*转移调配接受部门 */ transferRemark , /*转移调配备注 */ transferSign, /*转移调配流程标识 */ transferAcceptUser, /*转移调配接收人 */ transferDevolveDept, /*转移调配移交部门 */ transferDevolveUser, /*转移调配移交人 */ transferFlow, /*转移调配流程 */ transferDate, /*转移调配日期 */ flowUrl /*url_相关流程穿透 */ ) values ( util_common.getAbsID, (select id from vm_assetdocument where assetsCode = #assetsCode# ), #adminDeptId#, #returnRemark#, #flowId#, #adminUserId#, #applyDeptId#, #applyUserId#, #subject#, #applyDate#, #flowUrl# )
sqlMap.select: select id from ctp_affair where form_Recordid = (select id from vm_applyparts where serialNo = #serialNo# ) and node_policy = 'newCol'
select count(1) from vm_applypartsdetail where formmain_id = (select id from vm_assetdocument where assetsCode = #assetsCode# )
sqlMap.delete: delete from vm_applypartsdetail where applydate is null
sqlMap.select: select 'Asset_Year_Batch_T01' flowType, id, batchNo, util_user.getMemCodeByMemId(sendUserNo) sendUserNo, to_char(writeDate, 'yyyy-mm-dd') writeDate, pushState, pushDate, pushMembers, pushDeparts, pushAccounts, removeMembers, title, content from vm_cap4_staffYearAssetPush where id = #formId#

select distinct to_char(id) id, to_char(org_department_id) org_department_id from org_member where ( 1=0
org_account_id in ($pushAccounts$)
org_department_id in ($pushDeparts$)
id in ($pushMembers$)
)
id not in ($removeMembers$)
and is_admin=0 and is_internal=1 and type <> 2 and is_virtual=0 and is_deleted=0 and state = 1 and id not in (select staff from vm_cap4_staffYearAssetACK where batchNo = #batchNo# and staff is not null)
sqlMap.insert: insert into vm_cap4_staffYearAssetPushSon ( id, formmain_id, memberName, isFinish ) values ( util_common.getAbsID, #formId#, #memberId#, '-1089048568118490234' )
delete from vm_cap4_staffYearAssetPushSon where memberName is null

insert into vm_cap4_assetBatchDoc ( id, state, start_member_id, start_date, approve_member_id, approve_date, finishedflag, ratifyflag, ratify_member_id, ratify_date, sort, modify_member_id, modify_date, batchNo, batchDate, batchMember, batchDepart, batchMethod, batchTitle, assetType, assetCode, assetName, assetModel, buyDate, assetState ) select util_common.getAbsID, 1, -6760911671874597139, sysdate, 0, sysdate, 0, 0, 0, null, 0, -6760911671874597139, sysdate, #batchNo#, sysdate, v2.useMember, v2.useDepart, #asstBatchMethod#, #title#, v2.assetCategory, v2.assetsCode, v2.assetsName, v2.assetModel, v2.buyTime, v2.assetstatus from vm_assetdocument v2 where v2.assetstatus != -5190900076558529642 and v2.assetstatus != 1350324503683943655 and v2.useMember = #memberId#

insert into ctp_content_all (ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_DATE, MODULE_TYPE, MODULE_ID, MODULE_TEMPLATE_ID, CONTENT_TYPE, CONTENT, CONTENT_DATA_ID, CONTENT_TEMPLATE_ID, TITLE, SORT, HAS_HTML_SIGNATRUE, VOUCHER_ID) SELECT UTIL_COMMON.getAbsID, '1598169197901989123', sysdate, '1598169197901989123', sysdate, '42', '-5572289964263519421', '-2505388640116324887', '20', null, '-5572289964263519421', '-4944952729521666831', null, '0', '0', 'CAP4资产盘点详情' from vm_cap4_assetBatchDoc vm where id not in(select content_data_id from ctp_content_all c where c.content_template_id = -4944952729521666831 and content_data_id is not null)
